tasks.title: US-01: Project scaffold — manifest.json, directory structure, icons
US-02: selectors.js — all GitLab DOM selectors as named constants
US-03: mrContext.js — extract project ID, source branch, MR IID from page
US-04: apiInterceptor.js — intercept diffs_metadata.json via page-context fetch wrapper
US-05: gitattributesLoader.js — fetch + cache .gitattributes from GitLab API
US-06: gitattributesParser.js — parse .gitattributes text into pattern list + Node unit tests
US-07: fileMatcher.js — classify file paths against pattern list + Node unit tests
US-08: iconInjector.js + observer.js — wrench icon injection with MutationObserver
US-09: viewedMarker.js — write blob SHAs of generated files to GitLab localStorage
US-10: fileHider.js — DOM remove/restore generated file blocks and tree entries
US-11: Popup UI — toggles, status line, host config, chrome.storage.sync persistence
US-12: content/index.js + background.js — orchestration, SPA navigation, storage bridge
US-13: Integration testing, edge cases, README completion
